svg.title: Service dependencies
svg.desc: Service dependencies: dag diagram, 8 nodes, 9 edges. Service dependencies · a gateway fans to domain services, each grounding on its store. Flow: web → API gateway; API gateway → Auth; API gateway → Orders; API gateway → Search; Auth → Postgres (reads); Orders → Postgres; …. Full data in hw:payload.

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: The same topology grammar on light paper: white cards lifted by a two-layer drop shadow, royal-blue signal hero ring, 600-700-level flow hues against the pale ground; the explanatory sibling of the porcelain matrix.
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Identical chassis solve as the dark substrate (the geometry is substrate-blind): 64px fan pitch, 92px convergence pitch meeting at one point on the hero's facing edge, sequence lifelines at a 255px gap with 56px message pitch on a 5.236s replay clock. Cards bind --dna-surface-alt over --dna-border hairlines; node dots and branch strokes cycle the genome diagram_flow palette by non-hero order.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: The 6 percent lift shadow that seats cards on light paper is a literal genome value (var() never resolves in filter attributes), so per-variant shadow retunes are config edits, not CSS; muted comparison cards drop their accent dot entirely, trading slot symmetry for the inert-versus-live read the topology exists to assert.
